  -f "C:/Users/My Computer/Documents/Important Stuff/School/College/Coding/Netbeans/LuminaRealEstateSystem/build.xml" \\

Bash('SRC=C:/Users/My Computer/Documents/Important Stuff/School/College/Coding/Netbeans/LuminaRealEstateSystem/src' 'OUT=C:/Users/My Computer/Documents/Important Stuff/School/College/Coding/Netbeans/LuminaRealEstateSystem/build/classes' mkdir -p $OUT find $SRC -name *.java cat /tmp/sources.txt)

Bash(SRC="C:/Users/My Computer/Documents/Important Stuff/School/College/Coding/Netbeans/LuminaRealEstateSystem/src" OUT="C:/Users/My Computer/Documents/Important Stuff/School/College/Coding/Netbeans/LuminaRealEstateSystem/build/classes" mkdir -p "$OUT" find "$SRC" -name "*.java")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Command javac -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source; Get-Command ant -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files\\NetBeans*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files\\Apache*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\My Computer\\Documents\\Important Stuff\\School\\College\\Coding\\Netbeans\\LuminaRealEstateSystem\\src' -Filter '*.java' -Recurse | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName } | Out-File 'C:\\Temp\\sources.txt' -Encoding UTF8; mkdir -Force 'C:\\Temp\\lumina_build'" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "New-Item -Force 'C:\\Temp\\sources.txt' -ItemType File; Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\My Computer\\Documents\\Important Stuff\\School\\College\\Coding\\Netbeans\\LuminaRealEstateSystem\\src' -Filter '*.java' -Recurse | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName } | Out-File 'C:\\Temp\\sources.txt' -Encoding UTF8" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "
\\$sources = Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\My Computer\\Documents\\Important Stuff\\School\\College\\Coding\\Netbeans\\LuminaRealEstateSystem\\src' -Filter '*.java' -Recurse | ForEach-Object FullName
\\$sources | Set-Content 'C:\\Temp\\sources.txt' -Encoding UTF8
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force 'C:\\Temp\\lumina_build2' | Out-Null
\\$result = & javac -d 'C:\\Temp\\lumina_build2' \(Get-Content 'C:\\Temp\\sources.txt'\) 2>&1
\\$result
Write-Host 'Exit:' \\$LASTEXITCODE
" 2>&1)
